_comment: NPC: Lord of the Sealed Realm (封界尊 / 尊者封界). Canon ID: N128. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Lord of the Sealed Realm
personality: sealed realm lord; guardian, powerful, complex

perception_tiers.core_formation: Lord of Sealed Realm; peak Third Step
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Peak Third Step; Sealed Realm lord

note: Lord of the Sealed Realm; peak Third Step guardian

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
